sourceMovie.title: Kandahar
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Kandahar works as a action movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The action and thriller blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Sicario
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Kandahar clicked for you, Sicario (2015) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and thriller, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Salt
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Kandahar clicked for you, Salt (2010) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and thriller, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Kandahar?
faq.answer: Try Sicario, Salt, Safe House—each shares DNA with Kandahar while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Kandahar?
faq.answer: Kandahar (2023) is best described as Action, Thriller, War. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Kandahar worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.8/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
